identity.lead_description: No identifiable live-action lead should appear. If a human form is shown, keep it as a generic black silhouette with no facial detail or wardrobe specificity.

wardrobe.change_policy: This is not a wardrobe-driven job. The silhouette remains featureless and should not acquire fashion, costume, or influencer-specific styling.
locked_relationships: scene_002 may include only a neutral silhouette body shape
scene_001 and scene_003 should stay fully typography-driven with no wardrobe concept

scene_signatures: scene_001: bright blurred dictionary paper with a yellow highlight block
scene_002: dark neural starfield with electric radial glow
scene_003: black educational definition card with pale footer strip
background.change_policy: Preserve the editorial-learning aesthetic. Do not replace these scenes with rooms, live sets, or stock footage.

composition.framing: centered typography hierarchy with strong lower-footer retention bar
composition.look: educational vocabulary card with glow accents, staged text reveals, and reusable JSON-driven wording

text.pattern: central hero word plus repeated peripheral mini glossary entries
large payoff title plus bilingual example card

global: kinetic typography with sequenced opacity, lift, and scale reveals
footer bar retained as an explicit learning-progress motif

scene_overrides.motion_intent: slow push on a blurred dictionary background while the highlighted word settles into focus
small glossary entries accumulate around the center while the source-derived neural plate stays underneath and the memory score advances
the title and definition card reveal upward into a stable study-card layout

notes: This job routes to Remotion because all three scenes rely on code-driven typography, glow fields, and reusable structured text rather than standalone generated media.
Some background fidelity is handled through swappable input-media plates so the editable text and transitions can remain deterministic code.
Provider routing remains documented for repository consistency, but no startframe prompts or Kling prompts are planned for this package.
